title: iberis saxatilis subsp. longistyla
intro: Iberis saxatilis subsp. longistyla, also known as rock candytuft or creeping candytuft, is a perennial flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of glucosinolates and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Iberis saxatilis subsp. longistyla include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including coughs and colds.
